meaning: vt.涮,冲洗,痛饮,倒出vi.大口地喝,发激荡声n.涮,冲洗,痛饮,泔水
examples: Books swill only be on computers, not on paper.
Advertising gis the rattling of a stick inside a swill bucket.
Machines swill do all the dull jobs on farms, in factories and offices.
Even many American beer lovers would rather abstain than sip from a can of mass-produced swill.
To watch the financial transactions tax (FTT) being discussed is to be reminded of piglets at swill bucket time.
